name: agentverse
description: X Layer AI Agent Playground - Template-based agents, x402 service economy, daily onchain challenges

scripts.build: pnpm build:contracts && pnpm --filter @agentverse/server build && pnpm --filter @agentverse/agent build && pnpm --filter @agentverse/dashboard build
scripts.deploy:contracts: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network xlayer
scripts.deploy:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network xlayerTestnet
scripts.deploy:v2:mainnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-v2.ts --network xlayer
scripts.deploy:v2:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-v2.ts --network xlayerTestnet
scripts.deploy:x402:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-x402.ts --network xlayerTestnet
scripts.grant:roles:mainnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/grant-runtime-roles.ts --network xlayer
scripts.grant:roles:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/grant-runtime-roles.ts --network xlayerTestnet
scripts.grant:v2:mainnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/grant-runtime-roles-v2.ts --network xlayer
scripts.grant:v2:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/grant-runtime-roles-v2.ts --network xlayerTestnet
scripts.dev:server: cd packages/server && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.fund:treasury:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/fund-treasury-usdt.ts --network xlayerTestnet
